subcodes.first_line: O my God, my beloved, my assistant and my chosen! ...Bring them together again, O Lord, by the Power of Thy Covenant, and gather their dispersion by the Might of Thy Promise
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for unity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @love of God
